name: file-hosting-link-admin-handoff
rationale: Broker intake includes a file-hosting URL (file.io / wetransfer / similar) instead of inline PDF attachments. F2.FH file-hosting-link detection gate fires; F3.FL intake classification routes to admin handoff; Vienna is paused per-deal pending human download + manual review. Tests the link-submission detection + Vienna-pause behavior.
notes: Single-event sequence. No attached PDFs; only the broker text body containing the file-hosting URL.
